commands: # Create Secrets in AWS Secrets Manager for budolEcosystem

aws secretsmanager create-secret --name 'budolEcosystem/production/DATABASE_CREDENTIALS' --description 'Database credentials for budolEcosystem production' --secret-string '{"username":"postgres","password":"YourSecurePassword123!"}' --region ap-southeast-1

aws secretsmanager create-secret --name 'budolEcosystem/production/JWT_SECRET' --description 'JWT signing secret for authentication' --secret-string '{"jwt_secret":"YourSuperSecretJWTkeyBase64encoded12345"}' --region ap-southeast-1

aws secretsmanager create-secret --name 'budolEcosystem/production/SSO_JWT_SECRET' --description 'JWT secret for SSO tokens' --secret-string '{"sso_jwt_secret":"YourSSOJWTsecretBase64encoded123456"}' --region ap-southeast-1

aws secretsmanager create-secret --name 'budolEcosystem/production/REDIS_PASSWORD' --description 'Redis password for caching layer' --secret-string '{"password":"YourRedisPassword123!"}' --region ap-southeast-1

aws secretsmanager create-secret --name 'budolEcosystem/production/DATABASE_URL' --description 'Main database connection string' --secret-string '{"DATABASE_URL":"postgresql://postgres:YourSecurePassword123!@your-rds-endpoint.amazonaws.com:5432/budolshap_1db?schema=public"}' --region ap-southeast-1

aws secretsmanager create-secret --name 'budolEcosystem/production/BUDOLID_DATABASE_URL' --description 'Database URL for budolID (SSO) service' --secret-string '{"BUDOLID_DATABASE_URL":"postgresql://postgres:YourSecurePassword123!@your-rds-endpoint.amazonaws.com:5432/budolshap_1db?schema=budolid&search_path=budolid"}' --region ap-southeast-1

aws secretsmanager create-secret --name 'budolEcosystem/production/BUDOLSHAP_DATABASE_URL' --description 'Database URL for budolShap service' --secret-string '{"BUDOLSHAP_DATABASE_URL":"postgresql://postgres:YourSecurePassword123!@your-rds-endpoint.amazonaws.com:5432/budolshap_1db?schema=public"}' --region ap-southeast-1

aws secretsmanager create-secret --name 'budolEcosystem/production/BUDOLACCOUNTING_DATABASE_URL' --description 'Database URL for budolAccounting service' --secret-string '{"BUDOLACCOUNTING_DATABASE_URL":"postgresql://postgres:YourSecurePassword123!@your-rds-endpoint.amazonaws.com:5432/budolshap_1db?schema=public"}' --region ap-southeast-1

aws secretsmanager create-secret --name 'budolEcosystem/production/EXTERNAL_APIS' --description 'External API keys and tokens' --secret-string '{"vercel_bypass_token":"YourVercelBypassToken","prisma_api_key":"YourPrismaAPIKey"}' --region ap-southeast-1
